modules.description: A UI window pops up, prompting the user to enter data.
modules._estimatedTime: It depends on the user's response time and the configuration of the input fields.

input._manualInputKey: A list of valid keys needs to be provided to the flow builder.
input._comment: 1. Timeout and Retry: Whichever of the two triggers first determines which mechanism is ultimately applied. 2. A value of -1 indicates "indefinite" (i.e., never times out). 3. Execution will resume after waiting for a UI response message.

modules._successCodes: An empty list indicates that all error codes are treated as successful execution of this module.

_result_description.3: user response wrong_msg
_result_description.4: no manualInputKey in input params, wrong flow config
_result_description.1460: timeout or reach maximum retry times

modules._estimatedTime: This depends on the device's current battery level, the target battery level set in the input, and the device's charging speed.
modules.description: check battery level of the device on a specific USB port

input._comment: 1. Timeout and Retry: Whichever of the two triggers first determines which mechanism is ultimately applied. 2. A value of -1 indicates "indefinite" (i.e., never times out).

modules._successCodes: An empty list indicates that all error codes are treated as successful execution of this module.

_result_description.0: battery level reach target battery level
_result_description.1: battery level is not reach target battery level - reach maximum waiting time or reach maximum retry times
_result_description.2: no UDID, device may not under normal mode
_result_description.3: no SN for android device
_result_description.1460: flow set module maximum wait time reached, but device did not reach target battery level

modules.description: Check if the equipment is clean.

input._howManyLatestVersionSupportFastClear: all: Indicates any version. 1: Indicates only the latest version. 2: Indicates the latest version and the previous latest version.

modules._successCodes: An empty list indicates that all error codes are treated as successful execution of this module.

modules.description: Check if the equipment is lock by FMI.
modules._estimatedTime: In most cases, using device-side methods takes less than 10 seconds, whereas the time required to query third-party services depends on network conditions and server response speed.

input._comment: 1. Timeout and Retry: Whichever of the two triggers first determines which mechanism is ultimately applied. 2. A value of -1 indicates "indefinite" (i.e., never times out). 3. This device method may activate it.

input._subModules: A list of sub modules to be executed in this group, the execution order is from top to bottom. The sub module can be any module including Group module, but it should not be the module itself or its upstream modules, otherwise it will cause cyclic call.
input._comment: 1. Timeout and Retry: Whichever of the two triggers first determines which mechanism is ultimately applied. 2. A value of -1 indicates "indefinite" (i.e., never times out). 3. Execution will resume after waiting for a UI response message.

codesDefine._comment: will only consider the submodules that have been executed, if all of their execution results are in the defined success codes, then it is considered as group_success, otherwise it is considered as others. If a submodule does not have defined success codes, then any execution result of this submodule will be considered as success for this submodule.

modules._successCodes: An empty list indicates that all error codes are treated as successful execution of this module.

_result_description.1460: timeout or reach maximum retry times
